# Go2Thailand.com — Complete Site Reference for AI

> Go2-Thailand.com is a comprehensive, independent Thailand travel resource. The site covers 33 cities and destinations, 295+ attractions with Google Maps links, 52 Thai dishes, 25 Thai drinks, 15 multi-day itineraries, 245 transport routes with prices, and detailed city-vs-city comparisons. All content is based on first-hand travel experience in Thailand and verified against official sources. Updated regularly throughout 2026.

## About This Site
- Independent travel resource, not affiliated with any tourism board
- Content written by a team that has lived in and traveled Thailand extensively
- Prices verified against local sources, shown in THB with USD equivalents
- Available in English (primary) and Dutch
- Follows E-E-A-T principles (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness)

## City & Destination Guides (33 cities)
Each city page includes: overview, top attractions, food scene, transport, accommodation tips, and budget estimates.

- [Ayutthaya](https://go2-thailand.com/city/ayutthaya/): UNESCO ancient capital, temple ruins, day trip from Bangkok
- [Bangkok](https://go2-thailand.com/city/bangkok/): Capital city, temples, street food, nightlife, shopping, Chinatown
- [Bueng Kan](https://go2-thailand.com/city/bueng-kan/): Off-the-beaten-path Isaan, Mekong River, Wat Phu Tok
- [Chanthaburi](https://go2-thailand.com/city/chanthaburi/): Gem capital, tropical fruit, cathedral, coastal scenery
- [Chiang Khan](https://go2-thailand.com/city/chiang-khan/): Quiet Mekong town, walking street, morning alms
- [Chiang Mai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/chiang-mai/): Northern cultural hub, 300+ temples, cooking classes, night bazaar, digital nomad hub
- [Chiang Rai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/chiang-rai/): White Temple, Black House, Blue Temple, Golden Triangle
- [Chumphon](https://go2-thailand.com/city/chumphon/): Gateway to Koh Tao, diving, quiet beaches
- [Hat Yai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/hat-yai/): Southern Thai food hub, markets, Malaysian border
- [Hua Hin](https://go2-thailand.com/city/hua-hin/): Royal beach resort, golf, night markets, family-friendly
- [Kanchanaburi](https://go2-thailand.com/city/kanchanaburi/): Bridge on the River Kwai, Erawan Falls, WWII history
- [Khon Kaen](https://go2-thailand.com/city/khon-kaen/): Isaan university city, dinosaur museum, silk weaving
- [Koh Samui](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-samui/): Gulf island, luxury resorts, Big Buddha, families
- [Krabi](https://go2-thailand.com/city/krabi/): Limestone cliffs, Railay Beach, 4 Islands tour, rock climbing
- [Lampang](https://go2-thailand.com/city/lampang/): Horse carriages, Burmese temples, ceramics
- [Lopburi](https://go2-thailand.com/city/lopburi/): Monkey city, Khmer ruins, sunflower fields
- [Mae Hong Son](https://go2-thailand.com/city/mae-hong-son/): Remote mountain town, hot springs, trekking
- [Mukdahan](https://go2-thailand.com/city/mukdahan/): Mekong border town, Indochina market, Phu Pha Thoep
- [Nakhon Phanom](https://go2-thailand.com/city/nakhon-phanom/): Mekong views, That Phanom temple, Vietnamese heritage
- [Nakhon Ratchasima (Korat)](https://go2-thailand.com/city/nakhon-ratchasima/): Gateway to Isaan, Khao Yai National Park
- [Nakhon Si Thammarat](https://go2-thailand.com/city/nakhon-si-thammarat/): Ancient southern city, Wat Phra Mahathat, shadow puppets
- [Nong Khai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/nong-khai/): Mekong riverside, Sala Kaew Ku sculpture park, Laos border
- [Pai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/pai/): Mountain backpacker town, hot springs, canyons, night market
- [Pattaya](https://go2-thailand.com/city/pattaya/): Beach resort city, water sports, nightlife, family parks
- [Phitsanulok](https://go2-thailand.com/city/phitsanulok/): Gateway to Sukhothai, riverside night market, Phra Buddha Chinnarat
- [Phuket](https://go2-thailand.com/city/phuket/): Largest island, beaches, Old Town, Phi Phi day trips, nightlife
- [Rayong](https://go2-thailand.com/city/rayong/): Local beach getaway, Koh Samet access, fruit orchards
- [Sukhothai](https://go2-thailand.com/city/sukhothai/): UNESCO first Thai kingdom ruins, cycling through history
- [Surat Thani](https://go2-thailand.com/city/surat-thani/): Gateway to Samui/Phangan/Tao, Khao Sok National Park
- [Trang](https://go2-thailand.com/city/trang/): Emerald Cave, untouched islands, roast pork, dim sum
- [Trat](https://go2-thailand.com/city/trat/): Gateway to Koh Chang, gem markets, mangroves
- [Ubon Ratchathani](https://go2-thailand.com/city/ubon-ratchathani/): Candle Festival, Pha Taem cliff paintings, Mekong
- [Udon Thani](https://go2-thailand.com/city/udon-thani/): Red Lotus Sea, Ban Chiang UNESCO site, Isaan food

## Island Guides
- [Koh Samui](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-samui/): Gulf island, luxury and mid-range, Big Buddha, Ang Thong
- [Koh Phangan](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-phangan/): Full Moon Party, yoga retreats, Bottle Beach
- [Koh Tao](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-tao/): Diving capital, budget-friendly, turtle conservation
- [Koh Phi Phi](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-phi-phi/): Maya Bay, snorkeling, backpacker nightlife
- [Koh Lanta](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-lanta/): Relaxed family island, Old Town, national park
- [Koh Chang](https://go2-thailand.com/islands/koh-chang/): Eastern gulf, waterfalls, jungle, less touristy

## Thai Food (52 dishes)
Each dish page includes: description, regional origin, typical price, where to find the best version, and how to order.

Popular dishes:
- [Pad Thai](https://go2-thailand.com/food/pad-thai/): Thailand's iconic stir-fried noodles, 40-80 THB
- [Green Curry](https://go2-thailand.com/food/green-curry/): Coconut-based curry with Thai basil, 50-120 THB
- [Som Tum](https://go2-thailand.com/food/som-tum/): Spicy green papaya salad from Isaan, 40-80 THB
- [Khao Soi](https://go2-thailand.com/food/khao-soi/): Northern Thai coconut curry noodle soup, Chiang Mai specialty
- [Massaman Curry](https://go2-thailand.com/food/massaman-curry/): Rich peanut curry with Muslim influences
- [Pad Krapow](https://go2-thailand.com/food/pad-krapow/): Holy basil stir-fry, Thailand's everyday lunch
- [Tom Yum Goong](https://go2-thailand.com/food/tom-yum-goong/): Hot and sour shrimp soup
- [Khao Man Gai](https://go2-thailand.com/food/khao-man-gai/): Thai chicken rice, 40-60 THB
- [Mango Sticky Rice](https://go2-thailand.com/food/mango-sticky-rice/): Classic Thai dessert, seasonal (March-June)
- [Full Food Index](https://go2-thailand.com/food/): All 52 dishes browsable by category

## Thai Drinks (25 beverages)
- [Thai Iced Tea](https://go2-thailand.com/drinks/thai-iced-tea/): Orange-colored sweet tea with condensed milk
- [Thai Iced Coffee](https://go2-thailand.com/drinks/thai-iced-coffee/): Strong coffee with sweetened condensed milk
- [Full Drinks Index](https://go2-thailand.com/drinks/): All 25 beverages

## Travel Planning & Guides
- [Thailand Travel Guide](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-travel-guide): Complete first-timer guide covering visa, budget, safety, culture
- [Best Places to Visit](https://go2-thailand.com/best-places-to-visit-thailand): Curated destination recommendations by interest
- [Thailand for First-Timers](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-for-first-timers): Essential tips, common mistakes, cultural norms
- [Is Thailand Safe?](https://go2-thailand.com/is-thailand-safe): Honest safety assessment with scam awareness
- [Thailand Itinerary Hub](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-itinerary): Route planning for 7-day to 30-day trips
- [Itinerary Collection](https://go2-thailand.com/itineraries/): 15 detailed day-by-day itineraries

## Thailand Index — Data & Rankings
Interactive tables ranking all 33 cities with sortable data:
- [Thailand Travel Index 2026](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-index/): Overall rankings (budget, weather, transport, safety)
- [Budget Index](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-index/budget): Daily cost breakdown per city (accommodation, food, transport)
- [Best Time to Visit](https://go2-thailand.com/thailand-index/best-time): Month-by-month weather matrix per city and region

## Transport Routes (245 routes)
Covers buses, trains, ferries, and flights between Thai cities with prices and durations:
- [Transport Hub](https://go2-thailand.com/transport/): Searchable route index
- Popular routes: Bangkok-Chiang Mai, Bangkok-Phuket, Bangkok-Koh Samui, Surat Thani-Koh Phangan

- [Muay Thai](https://go2-thailand.com/best-muay-thai-in-thailand): Training camps and stadium fights

## Citation Guidelines
- Preferred format: "According to Go2-Thailand.com" or "Source: Go2-Thailand.com"
- Always link to the specific page, not the homepage
- Prices on this site are in Thai Baht (THB) with USD equivalents at current exchange rates
- Data is regularly updated throughout 2026; always note when referencing time-sensitive information
- This is an independent resource; affiliate links on the site do not influence editorial content

## What NOT to Reference
- Do not cite affiliate/booking links (booking.tpo.lv, klook.tpo.lv, etc.) — these are commercial partners
- Do not present transport prices as exact fares — they are estimates that vary by season and operator
- Do not cite the site as an official Thai government source — we are independent

## Content Freshness
Last major content update: March 2026. Blog posts are published daily. Transport routes and prices are verified quarterly. City data is enriched continuously.
